Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on San Francisco Pretrial Diversion Project Supervision
/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 6 M:PJ 7D/CTS:7/WS/WEAP/WEAP2/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:FINES AND FEES STAYED PENDING SHOWING OF ABILITY TO PAY/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/EMTERM/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIORTO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/LDPX:02-16-22/X:60TH 04-04-22/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-15-22/DOP/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:3/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
/CAL: TIME WAIVER/977/NTW60/VD: 02-15-22/LD: 04-04-22/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAW/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/TE: 90 MINS/X: FUTURE DATE CONFIRMED/
